Senior ML Researcher

Fir Institute
Montreal, QC

Role overview

The Fir Institute is seeking a Senior ML Researcher to advance state-of-the-art in generative models and contribute to open-source research frameworks.

Qualifications

  • PhD in ML, statistics, or related field
  • Strong publication record at ICML, NeurIPS, or ICLR
  • Expertise in diffusion models or transformers

Compensation

$140,000–$180,000 CAD plus bonus and equity.
